subject: Re: Fwd: Limitless Letter
body:
find jeffrey a very fast speedboat with an enclosed
wheelhouse... for the car   similar to the ribtec but
newer... the boat will not be sold but if you need
something to show your employer,,,

> Some time ago you had been kind enough to look into
> renewing the "right of
> sale" (for lack of a better name) letter regarding
> Limitless.  It has been
> expired for some time and I was wondering if you,
> JE, and LW would consider
> renewing it on a discrete level once again. 
> 
>  
> 
> I have had the opportunity of designing a "sister"
> to the yacht for a client
> and if the opportunity were to arise, I could
> probably talk the client into
> the boat rather than building another version as we
> did with
> Corinthia/Limitless evolution.  I know the boat well

body_html:
find jeffrey a very fast speedboat with an enclosed
wheelhouse... for the car similar to the ribtec but
newer... the boat will not be sold but if you need
something to show your employer,,,

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Would you like me to respond? If so, how?

Darren

From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
To: DKIEsq@aol.com
Subject: Limitless Letter
Date: Sat, 18 Feb 2006 12:42:50 -0500

Hello Darren,

We hope all is well with you and yours now that the
New Year us well upon
us.

Some time ago you had been kind enough to look into
renewing the "right of
sale" (for lack of a better name) letter regarding
Limitless. It has been
expired for some time and I was wondering if you,
JE, and LW would consider
renewing it on a discrete level once again.

I have had the opportunity of designing a "sister"
to the yacht for a client
and if the opportunity were to arise, I could
probably talk the client into
the boat rather than building another version as we
did with
Corinthia/Limitless evolution. I know the boat well
and have a considerable
amount of pride in her and would be able to describe
her well to prospective
buyers (ONLY if the boat were to become available).
Additionally, I could
field calls for you and the owner as my NDA is still
in effect.

I look forward to hearing from you.

FYI - I have been informed that Lurssen is
displaying an interior general
arrangement on their site.

Kindest regards,

Craig Tafoya

(954) 791-9992 Office

(954) 328-6203 Mobile
